ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appeparance. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
